manifest.author: Nik Danilov
manifest.description: Speech-to-text in Obsidian using OpenAI Whisper
manifest.name: Whisper

releases.author: nikdanilov
releases.description:
## Improvements
* Reorganize settings into logical sections: API Keys, Transcription, Recording, Output, Post-processing, Advanced
* Hide section sub-fields until their parent toggle is enabled
* "Save audio file" and "Create note file" are now on by default
* Preserve scroll position when toggling settings so the panel no longer jumps

## Bug Fixes
* Fix bug where "Note save path" stayed editable when "Create note file" was off
releases.name: v1.9.1

releases.author: nikdanilov
releases.description:
## Features
* **Post-processing provider dropdown** ([#116](https://github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin/issues/116)) — Choose between Anthropic, OpenAI, or Custom for post-processing. Selecting a provider auto-fills the API URL and default model. Custom mode lets you point at any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (OpenRouter, Groq, Together, Ollama, etc.) with a dedicated URL and API key.
* Request format is now driven by the selected provider, so Claude models served via OpenRouter and other gateways work correctly.

## Bug Fixes
* Clearing an API key field now actually clears the stored secret.
releases.name: v1.9.0

releases.author: nikdanilov
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
* Reset recording status when microphone fails to start (e.g. permission denied)
* Handle extensionless filenames correctly when creating note files
releases.name: v1.8.7

releases.author: nikdanilov
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
* paste transcription at cursor when saving note file ([#115](https://github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin/issues/115))
releases.name: v1.8.6

releases.author: nikdanilov
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
* mask API key fields in settings as password inputs
releases.name: v1.8.5

releases.author: nikdanilov
releases.description: Chore: add pre-commit formatting hook and format command.
releases.name: v1.8.4

releases.author: nikdanilov
releases.description:
## Features
* store API keys in Obsidian SecretStorage instead of data.json ([#83](https://github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin/issues/83), [#114](https://github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin/pull/114))

API keys are now stored securely in Obsidian's [SecretStorage API](https://docs.obsidian.md/Reference/TypeScript+API/SecretStorage) instead of plain text in `data.json`. Existing keys are automatically migrated on first load — no action needed. You can now safely commit your vault to git without exposing credentials.
releases.name: v1.8.3

releases.author: nikdanilov
releases.description:
## Fixes

- **Controls UI state sync** — buttons now update correctly on every open/close cycle (was only working the first time)
- **Timer as StatusBar listener** — timer starts/pauses/resets automatically from status changes, no manual orchestration
- **Controls reads from StatusBar** — UI reacts to the authoritative state, not the async recorder
- **Removed debug console.log** from AudioRecorder
- **Timer.pause()/resume() split** — separate methods instead of confusing toggle
releases.name: v1.8.2

releases.author: nikdanilov
releases.description:
## Fixes & Improvements

### Controls UI State Sync
- Controls modal now stays in sync when recording is started/stopped/paused via command palette, hotkey, or URI handler
- Timer properly starts/stops/pauses from all entry points (was only working from the Controls modal)

### Architecture Cleanup
- Centralized recording state transitions (`startRecording`, `stopRecording`, `pauseRecording`, `cancelRecording`) into the plugin class — commands, URI handler, and Controls all delegate to the same methods
- Split `Timer.pause()` toggle into separate `pause()` and `resume()` methods
- Removed debug `console.log` calls from AudioRecorder
- StatusBar now emits change events for UI synchronization
- Net -71 lines of duplicated code
releases.name: v1.8.1

releases.author: nikdanilov
releases.description:
## What's New

### Dictation Mode (New Default)
- Transcriptions always paste at cursor — no settings needed
- New installs default to pure dictation: speak → text at cursor
- Removed `pasteAtCursor` setting (always on) and `useTimestampFilename` setting
- Closes #34

### Post-Processing Improvements
- **Custom API URL** for post-processing — supports Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama, or any provider
- **Free-text model field** instead of dropdown — use any model ID
- **Richer default prompt** with markdown formatting and task list support
- Closes #70

### URI Handler
- `obsidian://whisper` protocol for external automation (iOS Shortcuts, Alfred)
- Commands: `start`, `stop`, `pause`, `cancel`
- Closes #27

### Settings Cleanup
- Reorganized into three sections: API Keys, Whisper Settings, Post-Processing Settings
- Removed `audioLinkStyle` — use `![[{{audioFile}}]]` or `[[{{audioFile}}]]` in note template instead
- Renamed settings for clarity and consistency
- Default filename template: `{{datetime}}`

### Updated README
- Full documentation of all settings, template variables, and URI handler
releases.name: v1.8.0

releases.author: nikdanilov
releases.description:
## What's New

### URI Handler for Automation (#27)
Trigger Whisper from iOS Shortcuts, Alfred, or any external tool:

- `obsidian://whisper` — open recording controls
- `obsidian://whisper?command=start` — start recording
- `obsidian://whisper?command=stop` — stop and transcribe
- `obsidian://whisper?command=pause` — pause/resume
- `obsidian://whisper?command=cancel` — discard recording

All commands are explicit (not toggles) to prevent accidental state changes from automation scripts.
releases.name: v1.7.2

releases.author: nikdanilov
releases.description:
## What's New

### Note Templates (#66)
- **Filename template** — customize note filenames with placeholders: `{{date}}`, `{{time}}`, `{{datetime}}`, `{{title}}`
- **Content template** — customize note body with placeholders: `{{transcription}}`, `{{audio}}`, `{{date}}`, `{{time}}`, `{{datetime}}`, `{{title}}`
- Default filename: `{{date}} {{title}}`, default content: `{{audio}}\n{{transcription}}`
- Works with auto-generated titles from LLM post-processing
releases.name: v1.7.1

releases.author: nikdanilov
releases.description:
## What's New

### LLM Post-Processing
- **Post-process transcriptions** with Claude or GPT to fix grammar, remove filler words, and improve readability
- **Auto-generate titles** — LLM creates descriptive filenames for transcription notes
- **Keep original transcription** — optionally append raw Whisper output below the polished text
- Supports both **Anthropic (Claude)** and **OpenAI (GPT)** models via dropdown

### Settings Reorganization
- Settings split into three clear sections: **API Keys**, **Whisper Settings**, **Post-Processing Settings**
- Separate API key fields for Whisper (OpenAI/Groq/Azure), OpenAI (GPT), and Anthropic (Claude)
- Cleaner settings architecture with `ApiKeysSettings`, `WhisperSettings`, and `PostProcessingSettings` interfaces
releases.name: v1.7.0

releases.author: nikdanilov
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
- Recording controls UX: buttons show/hide based on state (idle → Record only, recording → Pause/Stop/Cancel, paused → Resume/Stop/Cancel)
- Added Paused status bar state (yellow)
- Processing color changed to gray
- Pause/resume/cancel now show notices
- Sidebar icon changed to microphone
- Record button uses circle icon
- Removed console.log calls

* expose temperature and response_format settings ([#35](https://github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin/issues/35)) ([fcd97e8](https://github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin/commit/fcd97e88a82f0b500f789f04c63501ddf85770b8))

* show notice when recording starts ([#41](https://github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin/issues/41)) ([71f5a29](https://github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin/commit/71f5a297d5e22c7dbaf89bd403fa3bf6e93b1659))
* support custom API endpoints without API key ([#2](https://github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin/issues/2), [#61](https://github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin/issues/61), [#74](https://github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin/issues/74)) ([7850f12](https://github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin/commit/7850f123953395d8ba576db57327eae30661e36c))
* toggle between embed and link for audio file reference ([#26](https://github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin/issues/26)) ([257c10a](https://github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin/commit/257c10a892e23d9009bdeca4f0ad17c254a0933c))


### Bug Fixes

* skip transcription for silent/too-short recordings ([#65](https://github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin/issues/65), [#56](https://github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin/issues/56)) ([7a5092d](https://github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin/commit/7a5092da56163fa35fb2b944f5b1976cf7f92662))
